name: Better Than Sex Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines chocolate butter cake mix
recipeInstructions:
This recipe comes from the Harvard-Yale-Princeton Club in Pittsburgh:
1. Coat the pecans and half of the chocolate chips with cake mix, then set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the remaining cake mix, pudding mix, sour cream, eggs, oil, coffee, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract. Mix at medium speed for 3 minutes.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips and pecans until evenly distributed.
4. Grease and flour an ungreased tube pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool on a wire rack for 15 minutes.
7. Transfer the cooled cake onto a serving plate and let it cool completely before glazing.
GLAZE:
1. In a double boiler, combine the remaining chocolate chips and water. Heat over simmering water until smooth and shiny.
2. Remove from heat and stir in 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
3. Allow the glaze to thicken slightly before drizzling evenly over the cooled cake. Refrigerate until serving if desired.
